generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how hesitant our agencies can be to act decisively. The 2023 Boston incident showed what happens when we tie our hands with outdated restrictions. We need to empower our domestic security teams to act faster - the current rules make it too hard to stop threats before they escalate. Yes, we need safeguards, but we can't let perfect be the enemy of good when lives are at stake. #NationalSecurityFirst #ModernizeForSafety
